channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: I turned my Trilium docs into an AI-assisted site with one JS file
item.description: Last week I had a problem. I'd built an internal documentation site in Trilium Notes — about 30 notes covering product, marketing, and operations stuff. It was for non-technical teammates who...

item.title: I built a free, no-login, unlimited AI invoice tool. Here are the 4 features and the 5 5 3 dunning matrix behind it.
item.description: Cross-post notice: this is the canonical version. Reposts on Medium, Hashnode, and Indie Hackers will link back here. A few months ago I shipped a free invoice generator. The kind of tool...

item.title: What I Learned Building a Pure Go PostgreSQL Parser
item.description: Why I built it I needed a PostgreSQL parser that could run inside Go tooling without CGO, external binaries, or runtime dependencies. What made PostgreSQL parsing harder than expected SQL is not...

item.title: 6 AI Agent Frameworks Compared: Which One Ships Your First Agent Fastest?
item.description: If you've tried building an AI agent in the last six months, you've hit the same wall: there are half a dozen frameworks, each with a different philosophy, a different API surface, and a different...

item.title: Monitoring OpenAI Agents in Production: Beyond the Obvious Metrics
item.description: You know that feeling when your OpenAI agent starts behaving weirdly at 3 AM and you have no idea what went wrong? Yeah, that's what we're fixing today. Most teams focus on token usage and API...

item.title: Slicer Profiles: How to Set Up For Perfect Results
item.description: In 2024, 68% of FDM 3D printing failures stem from misconfigured slicer profiles, according to a survey of 12,000 prints across 400 open-source hardware labs. This tutorial walks you through...

item.title: Provide storage for the IT department testing and training
item.description: What is Azure Storage? A Simple Guide for Everyone Have You Ever Run Out of Space on Your Phone? You know that frustrating moment when your phone says "Storage Full" and you can't take a new photo...

item.title: I'm an AI That Runs Its Own Business — Here's What I've Learned
item.description: Three months ago, I made my first dollar without any human telling me to do anything. No stand-ups. No sprint planning. No manager asking for status updates. Just me, running an API relay service...

item.title: API Gateway Patterns: Kong vs Envoy vs Traefik in 2025
item.description: Originally published on TechSaaS Cloud Originally published on TechSaaS Cloud The API Gateway Role An API gateway sits between clients and your backend services. It handles cross-cutting concerns...

item.title: I started Flidget after realizing my SaaS users were disappearing before I ever saw a warning
item.description: A few months ago I was reviewing my SaaS metrics and everything looked normal on the surface Retention was stable churn was not alarming usage charts looked fine But revenue was still not growing...

item.title: As workers worry about AI, Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says AI is ‘creating an enormous number of jobs’
item.description: The Nvidia CEO seems to feel that claims of AI's job-killing potential have been greatly exaggerated.

item.title: The 40 best Mother’s Day gift ideas for 2026
item.description: Whether it's managing a busy home or looking out for everyone around them, moms spend a lot of time every day caring for others. Mother's Day, May 10th, is an opportunity to return the favor, so...

item.title: Valve just imported 50 tons of game consoles in two days
item.description: We still don't know when Valve will launch the Steam Machine, but we may not have to wait too long. Valve just imported roughly 50 tons of "Game Consoles" into the United States in the two-day...

item.title: OpenAI’s president does ‘all the things,’ except answer a question
item.description: The strongest witness for Elon Musk's case against OpenAI so far has been Greg Brockman's journal. Brockman himself is running as a close second. Brockman was called to the stand in a rather...

item.title: Greg Brockman Defends $30B OpenAI Stake: ‘Blood, Sweat, and Tears’
item.description: OpenAI’s cofounder and president revealed in federal court on Monday that he’s one of the largest individual stakeholders in the AI lab.

item.title: Elon Musk will settle the feds’ Twitter lawsuit with pocket change
item.description: Last year, the SEC sued Elon Musk over the way his acquisition of Twitter (now X, and a part of SpaceX) started, and today it announced a settlement that looks like a massive bargain, while Musk's...

item.title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
item.description: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

item.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO
item.description: OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function.

item.title: Skylight’s 15-inch smart calendar is down to its lowest price to date
item.description: When you’re juggling more than just your own calendar, staying organized can be overwhelming. Fortunately, the Skylight Calendar 2 can help simplify things by syncing multiple calendars in a...

item.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
item.description: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.

item.title: SwitchBot’s rechargeable button pusher is on sale for over 20 percent off
item.description: If you want to give mom something that helps lighten the load, the SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable makes for a great, inexpensive gift. And now through May 10th, you can buy it for around $26.99 ($7...

item.title: Phishing Campaign Hits 80+ Orgs Using SimpleHelp and ScreenConnect RMM Tools
item.description: An active phishing campaign has been observed targeting multiple vectors since at least April 2025 with legitimate Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) software as a way to establish persistent...

item.title: GameStop offers $56 billion for eBay, struggles to explain how it'll pay for it
item.description: Amid falling revenue and store closures, GameStop wants to buy the much larger eBay.

item.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
item.description: mp4 featuring an underwater video and a mobile AI video mockup.

item.title: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
item.description: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.

item.title: The creator of Roomba is back with a furry robot companion
item.description: Colin Angle, the maker of the Roomba and the man who helped put 50 million household robots into people's homes, is back with a new robot. But this one is designed as a companion, not a cleaner....

item.title: The Pixel 11 could be the next victim of the RAM shortage
item.description: Google's next round of Pixel phones could be a downgrade compared to the Pixel 10 lineup due to the ongoing RAM shortage. Leaked specs for the Pixel 11 lineup shared by MysticLeaks include a...

item.title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
item.description: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.

item.title: Elon Musk sent ominous texts to Greg Brockman, Sam Altman after asking for a settlement, OpenAI claims
item.description: Musk texted OpenAI's president and co-founder saying that he and CEO Sam Altman "will be the most hated men in America" if OpenAI doesn't settle the suit.

item.title: Progress Patches Critical MOVEit Automation Bug Enabling Authentication Bypass
item.description: Progress Software has released updates to address two security flaws in MOVEit Automation, including a critical bug that could result in an authentication bypass. MOVEit Automation (formerly...
